prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ULTRALIGHTSPORTBOTTLE-WHITE Product Type: BOTTLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Ultralight Sports Bottle 16oz TSA Compliant Food Grade White Description: Stay hydrated on the go with the ASR Outdoor Ultralight Sport Bottle.

This bottle holds up to 16 fluid ounces of liquid, and is constructed of food grade BPA free plastic. It is TSA compliant, so you can rest assured it won't be thrown out or confiscated at the airport.

Each bottle comes with a handy carabiner so you can easily clip your bottle when not in use, Make sure you keep one of these with your work out gear, backpack or travel bag. Search Terms: camping hiking sporting events flasks alcohol bladder Features: - ASR Outdoor Ultralight Sport Bottle - White - Food Grade & BPA Free Plastic - Capacity: 16 Fluid Ounces - Comes with Clip on Carabiner - TSA Compliant === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Ultralight Sports Bottle 16oz White

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16oz White Ultralight Sport Bottle

anthropic.title_differentiation: 16Oz Capacity, Food Grade BPA Free, TSA Compliant, Carabiner Clip, Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: Food Grade BPA Free Plastic, TSA Compliant, Clip On Carabiner, Lightweight Travel For Gym Camping Hiking
